flag_smartRecommendations_enabled.description: Enable/disable smart recipe and shopping recommendations

flag_advancedAnalytics_enabled.description: Enable/disable detailed performance and usage analytics

flag_mealPlanning_enabled.description: Enable/disable weekly meal planning and grocery generation

flag_barcodeScanning_enabled.description: Enable/disable barcode scanning for quick item addition

flag_priceTracking_enabled.description: Enable/disable grocery price tracking and trends

kill_geminiIntegration.description: Kill switch: set true to immediately disable Gemini AI for all users

kill_smartRecommendations.description: Kill switch: set true to immediately disable smart recommendations

kill_offlineMode.description: Kill switch: set true to immediately disable offline mode

kill_advancedAnalytics.description: Kill switch: set true to immediately disable advanced analytics

kill_mealPlanning.description: Kill switch: set true to immediately disable meal planning

kill_householdSharing.description: Kill switch: set true to immediately disable household sharing

kill_barcodeScanning.description: Kill switch: set true to immediately disable barcode scanning

kill_priceTracking.description: Kill switch: set true to immediately disable price tracking

kill_darkMode.description: Kill switch: set true to immediately disable dark mode

kill_notifications.description: Kill switch: set true to immediately disable all notifications

kill_newTutorial.description: Kill switch: set true to immediately disable the new tutorial

kill_receiptScanning.description: Kill switch: set true to immediately disable receipt OCR scanning

kill_ads.description: Kill switch: set true to suppress all AdMob banner ads

limit_free_searches_weekly.description: Free tier: max Spoonacular recipe searches per week

limit_free_recipes_max.description: Free tier: max saved recipes total

limit_free_mealplanning_weekly.description: Free tier: max meal plan recipe additions per week

limit_free_gemini_weekly.description: Free tier: max Gemini AI requests per week

limit_premium_searches_weekly.description: Premium tier: max Spoonacular recipe searches per week

limit_premium_recipes_max.description: Premium tier: max saved recipes total

limit_premium_mealplanning_weekly.description: Premium tier: max meal plan recipe additions per week (-1 = unlimited)

limit_premium_gemini_weekly.description: Premium tier: max Gemini AI requests per week

limit_family_searches_weekly.description: Family tier: max Spoonacular recipe searches per week (-1 = unlimited)

limit_family_recipes_max.description: Family tier: max saved recipes total (-1 = unlimited)

limit_family_mealplanning_weekly.description: Family tier: max meal plan recipe additions per week (-1 = unlimited)

limit_family_gemini_weekly.description: Family tier: max Gemini AI requests per week (-1 = unlimited)

expiry_critical_days.description: Days remaining threshold for red (critical) expiry badge

expiry_warning_days.description: Days remaining threshold for orange (warning) expiry badge

expiry_info_days.description: Days remaining threshold for yellow (info) expiry badge

expiry_frozen_alert_days.description: Days remaining before frozen items surface expiry alerts

expiry_recipe_suggestion_days.description: Suggest use-up recipes for items expiring within this many days

app_review_min_days_between_prompts.description: Minimum days between App Store / Play Store review prompts

notifications_max_stored.description: Maximum notifications stored per user in Firestore cache

search_history_max_items.description: Maximum search history entries stored in localStorage

undo_max_actions.description: Maximum undoable actions kept in IndexedDB

ads_enabled.description: Master switch for AdMob banner ads (free tier, native only)

maintenance_mode.description: Set true to show a maintenance banner and block write operations

maintenance_message.description: User-facing text shown in the maintenance banner

announcement_enabled.description: Set true to show an in-app announcement banner to all users

announcement_message.description: Text displayed in the announcement banner

gemini_model.description: Gemini model ID for text / recipe / analysis requests

gemini_model_vision.description: Gemini model ID for pantry image and receipt scan tasks

gemini_max_batch_size.description: Maximum concurrent Gemini requests processed per batch

gemini_debounce_delay_ms.description: Milliseconds to wait before flushing the Gemini request queue

min_app_version.description: Minimum supported app version (semver). Older builds get an update prompt.

Feature Flags.description: Enable / disable features and control staged rollout percentages

Kill Switches.description: Emergency kill switches — set true to immediately disable a feature for all users without a release

Plan Limits.description: Usage caps per subscription tier. Requires app re-fetch to apply. -1 = unlimited.

Expiry Alerts.description: Day thresholds that control when expiry badges and suggestion prompts appear

Maintenance & Announcements.description: Maintenance mode and in-app announcement banners — no release required

Gemini AI.description: Gemini model selection and request batching tuning
